entries.definition:
unloading (2:58) وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ادْخُلُوا هَذِهِ الْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًا وَادْخُلُوا
الْبَابَ سُجَّدًا وَقُولُوا حِطَّةٌ نَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطَايَاكُمْ remember when we said, ‘Enter
this town and eat freely there as you will, but enter its gate
humbly and say, “[We beg] for relief [unload us of our sins]”,
then We shall forgive you your sins.
entries.definition_english:
unloading (2:58) وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ادْخُلُوا هَذِهِ الْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًا وَادْخُلُوا
الْبَابَ سُجَّدًا وَقُولُوا حِطَّةٌ نَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطَايَاكُمْ remember when we said, ‘Enter
this town and eat freely there as you will, but enter its gate
humbly and say, “[We beg] for relief [unload us of our sins]”,
then We shall forgive you your sins.

entries.definition:
h–ẓ–ẓ luck, good fortune, a fortunate person; a share, an
allocation. Of this root, حَظّ ḥaẓẓ occurs seven times in the

Qurʾan.

حَظّ ḥ-ẓ-ẓ [n.] 1 share, portion (4:11) لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الْأُنْثَيَيْنِ to the male is the like of the share of two females 2 luck, good fortune (28:79) يَالَيْتَ لَنَا مِثْلَ مَا أُوتِيَ قَارُونُ إِنَّهُ لَذُو حَظٍّ عَظِيمٍ if only we had the like of what Qarun has been given: he really has good fortune.
entries.definition_english:
h–ẓ–ẓ luck, good fortune, a fortunate person; a share, an
allocation. Of this root, حَظّ ḥaẓẓ occurs seven times in the

Qurʾan.

حَظّ ḥ-ẓ-ẓ [n.] 1 share, portion (4:11) لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الْأُنْثَيَيْنِ to the male is the like of the share of two females 2 luck, good fortune (28:79) يَالَيْتَ لَنَا مِثْلَ مَا أُوتِيَ قَارُونُ إِنَّهُ لَذُو حَظٍّ عَظِيمٍ if only we had the like of what Qarun has been given: he really has good fortune.
